title: euonymus japonicus f. viridivariegatus
intro: Euonymus japonicus f. viridivariegatus, also known as the Japanese spindle or Green and Gold, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its striking variegated leaves with golden and green hues. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Japanese herbalism, and is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal benefits. The health benefits of Euonymus japonicus f. viridivariegatus include reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as promoting cardiovascular health and immune function. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies, such as a poultice for skin conditions.
